intro: You spot {{poachers}} attacking {{legendaryPokemon}}! The legendary Pokemon is trying to fight back, but it is badly outnumbered.
title: Poke Poachers
description: poachers have cornered {{legendaryPokemon}}. Defeat the poachers before the legendary Pokemon falls.

1.label: Intervene
1.tooltip: (+) Fight the poachers and earn a reward if {{legendaryPokemon}} survives

2.label: Stay hidden
2.selected: You stay out of sight and slip away.

outro.success: {{legendaryPokemon}} steadies itself and nods gratefully. It leaves something behind before flying away.
outro.failed: The poachers manage to capture {{legendaryPokemon}} and make a clean getaway.
